name: ExtensionStructureDefinition_FhirVersion
title: R5: fhirVersion
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `StructureDefinition.fhirVersion` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`StructureDefinition.fhirVersion` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `StructureDefinition.fhirVersion` 0..1 `code`
*  R4B: `StructureDefinition.fhirVersion` 0..1 `code`
*  R4: `StructureDefinition.fhirVersion` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `StructureDefinition.fhirVersion` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `StructureDefinition.fhirVersion` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.comment:
Element `StructureDefinition.fhirVersion` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `StructureDefinition.fhirVersion` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
A StructureDefinition does not need to specify the target it applies to as StructureDefinitions will often be valid across multiple versions of FHIR. FHIR tooling can determine whether a StructureDefinition is consistent with a particular StructureDefinition if desired.

element.definition: The version of the FHIR specification on which this StructureDefinition is based - this is the formal version of the specification, without the revision number, e.g. [publication].[major].[minor], which is 4.6.0. for this version.
element.comment: A StructureDefinition does not need to specify the target it applies to as StructureDefinitions will often be valid across multiple versions of FHIR. FHIR tooling can determine whether a StructureDefinition is consistent with a particular StructureDefinition if desired.
